Table	Create Table
inventory	CREATE TABLE `inventory` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `tenantId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `locationId` int NOT NULL,
  `batch` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `expiryDate` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `uniqueCode` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `serialNumber` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `reservedQuantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` enum('available','quarantine','blocked','damaged','expired') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `locationZone` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `labelCode` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `tenant_product_idx` (`tenantId`,`productId`),
  KEY `location_idx` (`locationId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_label_tenant_idx` (`labelCode`,`tenantId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=240001
